title: Transforming `==` into `>` may not be safe with respect to X values

features.name: OR'd equality comparisons with partially-X input operands
features.description: Code should include multiple equality comparisons OR'd together where operands may have unknown (X) bits in some positions

features.name: equality-to-relational operator optimization
features.description: Code should include a chain of equality comparisons with consecutive maximum constants that could be optimized to a single relational comparison

features.name: X value semantic difference between equality and relational operators
features.description: Code should include equality and greater-than comparisons on the same operand to show semantic difference in X handling
features.snippet:
wire eq_result = in == 3'h5;  // can return 1 when high bits are known
wire gt_result = in > 3'h4;  // must return x if any bit is x
